Fields.Description: Eval sample / example id from V9.0 dataset inventory.
One of CandidateReranker / RouterIntentClassifier / PackageQuality / MemoryPromotion / ConstraintGap.
Human-proposed correct label for the sample.
Reviewer confidence 0..1 — feeds into V9.7 promotion readiness scoring.

FeedbackIngestionContract.Notes: Approved feedback may only enter shadow training set after V9.7 promotion readiness gate passes. No runtime authority; no gate authority.

FutureTaskFamilyReadinessPlans.NotReadyReason: policy-feedback-features dataset is empty; no signal to train PackageQuality shadow scorer.
MissingRequirements: Populate policy-feedback-features.jsonl with ≥50 human-reviewed feedback entries (via V9.5 feedback ingestion contract).
Define PackageQuality target labels (e.g. CoverageOK / ConstraintMissing / EntityMissing).
Add coverage/constraint/entity completeness features per package.
NextSteps: After V9.7 promotion readiness, accumulate ≥50 approved feedback samples.
Train shadow PackageQualityScorer using exported feedback dataset.
Run shadow eval against ranking-pairs to validate scorer signal alignment.

FutureTaskFamilyReadinessPlans.NotReadyReason: No dedicated memory-shadow lifecycle dataset yet; memory promotion features (recency, semantic anchor, lifecycle stage) need to be exported.
MissingRequirements: Export memory-shadow lifecycle features per memory candidate (recency, anchor, lifecycle stage).
Define promotion targets (Promote / KeepStable / Demote / Archive).
Generate paired (memory-id, lifecycle-decision) examples from existing memory traffic.
NextSteps: Define labeling schema with human review.
Once ≥100 labeled memory promotion examples exist, train shadow promoter.

FutureTaskFamilyReadinessPlans.NotReadyReason: policy-feedback-features dataset lacks structured missing-constraint / missing-entity / missing-uncertainty annotations.
MissingRequirements: Add missingConstraintCount / missingEntityCount / missingUncertaintyCount fields to feedback schema.
Capture human reviewer's structured gap annotations.
Generate at least 50 gap-annotated samples per package failure mode.
NextSteps: Extend V9.5 feedback ingestion contract with structured gap fields.
Train shadow gap detector once data threshold met.
Validate gap detector against V9.1-V9.3 failure clusters.
